posts: 🐎 Celebrate Chinese New Year with @ push 🥰 Chinese New Year is here! To mark the occasion, you can send crypto as festive hongbao 🧧 right inside Telegram. Here's how: 1 • Type @ push in any chat or channel. 2 • Enter the amount in TON, USDT or MY. 3 • Add hongbao and send—your gift will arrive as a special red envelope 😉 🧧 Try sending @ push 88 USDT hongbao in a chat and celebrate the Lunar New Year with your friends and loved ones. 🌸 春节快乐，马年吉祥！恭喜发财，万事如意 ✨ News • 𝕏 • Mini App • Download

New for Gateway 2026 - Innovation Lab — a dedicated stage for live tech demos, architecture deep-dives, and hands-on developer sessions - Community Stage — builder stories, creator case studies, and ecosystem updates from the people shipping and scaling If you’re planning to come, lock it now — Dubai logistics only get harder the longer you wait. ➡️ Get Your Ticket (Crypto) ➡️ Get Your Ticket (Card) ➡️ Book at the Grand Hyatt Dubai See you in Dubai!

🎬 TON One on One | Max and Gio Interview From co-founding MoonPay to leading the TON Foundation. Max Crown, President & CEO of TON Foundation, sat down with content creator Gio to share his journey, the lessons, and the vision for 2026. Topics covered: ▪️ Max’s entrepreneurial journey from MoonPay to TON Foundation ▪️ Why TON's Community is different ▪️ Collectibles, gifts, and culture ▪️ Prediction markets, payments ▪️ What Gateway 2026 will look like 👉 Here’s a sneak peek. Full video drops soon. Gateway General Tickets | Moongat e Tickets

🚨A deep dive into our Hong Kong event. Nikola (VP of Payments) and Glenn (VP of Business Development) from TON Foundation sat down with Sam Kamani for a deep dive into TON Pay and the future of on-chain commerce. Listen to the Full Podcast Gateway General Tickets | Moongat e Tickets

💎 TON Pay Already Works Not a roadmap item. Not coming soon. Live now. Moongate is already using TON Pay to sell Gateway 2026 tickets. ▪️ Pay with $TON or $USDT ▪️ One checkout flow ▪️ Instant settlement on TON This is what TON Pay looks like in production 🔥 Gateway General Tickets | Moongat e Tickets

💎 Get Your Gateway Ticket Gateway 2026 is happening May 1-2 in Dubai. This year's event is focused on builders and creators. New Innovation Lab. New Community Stage. Protocol reveals. Live product launches. 1,500+ people shaping TON's future will be in the room. 👉Crypto payments available via Moongate and T ribute 👉Web2 Payment available in L uma 👉Book a ho tel

💎 Gateway 2026 | Early Bird NFT Tickets Now Available Early bird tickets are now on sale with TON & USDT payments. Connect your TON Wallet , Tonkeeper or MyTONWallet to get your NFT Ticket. Moongate is one of the first partners to integrate TON Pay. 🎟 Get your tickets now 👀 Read Blog Post 🎉 Join us at Gateway!

💎 TON Foundation Partners with Banxa Stablecoin payments for thousands of SMEs across Asia. Now on TON. Banxa, an OSL Group company, brings licensed crypto infrastructure across US, Europe, UK, Canada, and APAC. Through this partnership, businesses can access TON-based payment rails for: ▪️ B2B settlements ▪️ Cross-border transactions ▪️ Consumer-to-business payments Real-world utility. In production today. Read Full Article

From TON Foundation, With Love 💝 All week long, appreciation went on-chain. From Telegram gifts to heartfelt gestures, you showed up for your inner circle. Now, take a moment to unplug, sit back, and enjoy quality time with those who matter the most Thank you for an incredible week of support. Share with us 👇 Your favourite on-chain Valentine gift ❤️ #BeMyValenTON

TON Pay Hong Kong Recap 🚀 The event that stole the show Key capabilities ▪️ One integration across TON apps ▪️ Near-instant on-chain settlement ▪️ Low transaction fees (built for micro-payments) ▪️ Native checkout experiences ▪️ Merchant dashboard with built-in analytics TON Pay handles settlement, security, and payment logic. Merchants focus on product and user experience. 👉 Apply for early access 👉 Docu m entation

💎 Cross-Chain Deposits | Now Live in TON Wallet Top up your TON Wallet directly from other networks. Stablecoins convert 1:1. 👉 Send 100 USDC on Arbitrum → Receive 100 USDT on TON. How it works 1️⃣ Tap Deposit on the main screen 2️⃣ Select Stablecoins 3️⃣ Choose your token (e.g. USDC) 4️⃣ Select the network 5️⃣ Copy the address and send Your deposit is converted and credited automatically. No bridges. No third-party services. Just send. Powered by swaps.xyz via MoonPay. Note: Deposit addresses are single-use. swaps.xyz is a third-party protocol. DeFi carries risks. Gateway

🏆 We have our winners! 🏆 The TON x AWS Hackathon showcased some truly impressive builds - creative ideas, strong execution, and smart use of AI. Big congrats to all the winners 👏 🥇 SplitTheBill by @ Magdalena_o 🥈 Sell Your Stuff by @ Flu4y 🥉 Zen Scan by @ Masashi_Ono0611 🏅 Best UX/CX: CalSnap by @ yXsevaXy 🏅 Best Idea: Today For Us by @ GldnJet Thank you to every builder who participated. This was a strong showing across the board.

Final winner of the day chosen on X ! Thank you for playing! 🕺 We will be choosing 2 winners everyday this week up to the 14th! One on Telegram and One on X. $1,600 remain! 🤑 To enter go and check the post that this one is replying to!
Live from Hong Kong ✨💎 This is how a great event looks like " TON Foundation " Great team 🫶 With Asseto, HashKey, OSL, Animoca Brands, Plume, ChainNeXT and Native Group Stay tuned ⏰ for more to come

‼️BREAKING 🔥 💎 Introducing TON Pay | Payments Infrastructure for TON A new SDK that lets merchants and developers accept crypto payments across TON-native applications. Starting with Telegram Mini Apps. Key capabilities ▪️ One integration across TON apps ▪️ Near-instant on-chain settlement ▪️ Low-cost transactions ▪️ Native checkout experiences ▪️ Merchant dashboard and analytics TON Pay handles settlement, security, and payment logic. Merchants focus on product and user experience. 👉 Apply for early access 👉 Documentation

🎬 TON One on One | Max x Gio Full Interview The full interview is live 👏 Max Crown, President & CEO of TON Foundation sat down with content creator Gio for an in-depth discussion on: ▪️ Max’s story of co-founding MoonPay ▪️ What makes TON's Community different ▪️ Meme culture, gifts, and digital ownership ▪️ Prediction markets, payments, AI agents ▪️ Gateway 2026 and what's next BE THERE OR MISS THE BOAT: Gateway 5/1-5/2 👉 Watch the full interview 💬 What's one thing from this interview you want to see happen on TON this year? Gateway General Tickets | Moongat e Tickets

Quick update from us: An earlier post included a wrong tag that led to an unaffiliated page. We removed the post as soon as it was flagged and shared the correct info. We apologize for the confusion this may have caused. Please always report to us any suspicious links — it really helps keep the ecosystem safe. We’re here to support wallets and builders across TON Foundation, and we’ll keep improving our processes as we grow together with the community.

📸 It's happening. Max Crown, President & CEO of TON Foundation sat down with content creator Gio for an in-depth conversation about TON, Telegram, and what's next. Full video coming soon. Gateway General Tickets | Moongat e Tickets

🎬 Tech Updates EP1 | Andrew Grekov A look inside the engineering behind TON's developer tools. Andrew Grekov, Head of TON Tech, on why AppKit exists and what it changes for developers. "Developers spend too much time on infrastructure, not enough on the product. We want to flip that." 👉 Watch the full episode 💬 What would you try first on AppKit? Drop your answer below👇 G ateway General Tickets | Moongat e Tickets

🎬 Tech Interviews | Trailer Meet the team building the tools behind TON💎 "Developers spend too much time on infrastructure. Our main goal is to make their life easier." Full interviews coming soon 👀 G ateway General Tickets | Moongat e Tickets

💎 AppKit | Alpha Announcement TON is the blockchain built into Telegram. Apps built on TON can reach Telegram's billion+ users directly. Until now, every team had to build wallet connections, transaction handling, and DeFi integrations from scratch. Weeks of work before a single line of product code. Today we're announcing AppKit alpha to change that. What's live now: ▪️ Wallet management and transaction sending ▪️ DeFi integration (swaps, staking) ▪️ TON Connect support ▪️ TypeScript and React support ▪️ LLM-friendly (describe an app, build a prototype in minutes) WalletKit is also production-ready for wallet developers on iOS, Android, React Native, and Web. More features coming at Gateway (May 1-2). 👉 R ead more
Happy Lunar New Year to our incredible
💎 Skip the bank. Keep moving. No lines. No holds. No "2-3 business days." Your wallet works on your schedule. Not theirs. That's the point. 😁

🚨 BREAKING: TON’s Blueprint for Mass Adoption " Most blockchains were built for crypto-native experimentation first. TON took the opposite approach." @ MCrown , President & CEO of TON Foundation 💎 In a new feature with cryptonews, Max Crown breaks down the secret behind TON’s rapid growth Here’s the secret TON has been built for internet scale from day one: • Wallet embedded inside Telegram • NFTs as social objects (culture first, finance second) At TON, distribution isn’t a strategy, it’s infrastructure. 👉 Read the full article here

🎟 Gateway 2026 Tickets Now Available on Tribute You can now purchase Gateway tickets through Tribute with payments in RUB, EUR, and USDT. Two ticket types ● Early Bird : $189 (only 75 tickets) 👉 Get Early Bird Ticket ● General Admission: $249 👉 Get GA Ticket ⚠️ When purchasing through Tribute, please read the description carefully and fill out all required details. 📍 Dubai | Grand Hyatt Exhibition Centre 📅 May 1–2 👥 1,500+ builders, founders, developers, creators Two days of networking, talks, and opportunities for those building on TON. Early Bird is limited, don't wait. Gateway
